facebook.caption: Tourists keep walking past this one. Milana Beach Resort & Spa Phú Quốc sits off the main strip with rustic bungalows, a private beach area, a pool, and a spa. 813 reviews and still flying under the radar. No lobby chaos. No resort crowds. Just sand, shade, and a pace that actually slows you down. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Private beach. Rustic bungalow. Zero crowds. Milana Beach Resort & Spa Phú Quốc is what Phu Quoc looked like before the big resorts moved in. 813 reviews back it up.
